title: Register a new user and enter onboarding
description: Verifies a user can submit registration and is redirected into the onboarding intro screen.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify the user lands on the onboarding introduction screen

title: Registration shows error for invalid email format
description: Verifies registration blocks submission and shows a validation error when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration screen

title: Registration requires name
description: Verifies registration cannot be completed when the name field is left empty.

steps.description: Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify a required field validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration screen

title: Registration requires password
description: Verifies registration cannot be completed when the password field is left empty.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Verify a required field validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration screen

title: Registration rejects too-short password
description: Verifies registration shows a password validation error when an invalid password is provided.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a too-short password into the password field
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration screen

title: Login succeeds and redirects to main experience
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and reaches the main experience screen.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the main experience screen

title: Login shows error on incorrect credentials
description: Verifies login fails with invalid credentials and an error is displayed while staying on the login screen.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login screen

title: Login requires email
description: Verifies login cannot be submitted without providing an email.

steps.description: Verify a required field validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login screen

title: Login requires password
description: Verifies login cannot be submitted without providing a password.

steps.description: Verify a required field validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login screen

title: Complete onboarding selections and reach main experience
description: Verifies a user can progress through onboarding screens, make required selections, complete onboarding, and reach the main experience.

steps.description: Proceed to the next onboarding step
Proceed to the next onboarding step
Select one or more learning goals
Proceed to the next onboarding step
Select an initial country or cuisine
Verify the user lands on the main experience screen

title: Onboarding blocks progress when mode is not selected
description: Verifies the onboarding flow enforces selecting a learning mode before proceeding.

steps.description: Proceed to the next onboarding step without selecting a learning mode
Verify a validation error prompting a required selection is visible
Verify the user remains on the learning mode selection screen

title: Onboarding blocks progress when no goals are selected
description: Verifies the onboarding flow enforces selecting at least one goal before proceeding.

steps.description: Proceed to the next onboarding step without selecting any goals
Verify a validation error prompting a required selection is visible
Verify the user remains on the goals selection screen

title: Onboarding blocks completion when no country is selected
description: Verifies the onboarding flow enforces selecting a country/cuisine before completion.

steps.description: Attempt to complete onboarding without selecting a country or cuisine
Verify a validation error prompting a required selection is visible
Verify the user remains on the country selection screen

title: Onboarding intro page loads primary content
description: Verifies the onboarding introduction screen renders its primary content and allows starting onboarding navigation.

steps.description: Scroll through the onboarding introduction content
Verify onboarding introduction content is displayed
Proceed to the next onboarding step
Verify the learning mode selection screen is displayed

title: User Profile: View stats and update avatar + username
description: Verifies a user can view profile stats and successfully change avatar and username with changes reflected on the profile screen.

steps.description: Fill ProfileUser_TC001 into the username field
Verify the updated username ProfileUser_TC001 is displayed on the profile
Verify the profile shows XP, level, and streak stats

title: User Profile: Invalid username shows validation and does not update
description: Verifies entering an invalid/empty username prevents saving and shows a validation error with no profile update.

steps.description: Fill an empty value into the username field
Verify a username validation error is visible
Verify the username is not updated to an empty value

title: User Profile: Profile page loads primary content
description: Verifies the profile screen loads and displays the primary user identity and stats content.

steps.description: Verify the user profile identity section is displayed
Verify the profile shows XP, level, and streak stats

title: User Profile: Change username only and persist on screen
description: Verifies saving a valid username change updates the displayed username on the profile screen.

steps.description: Fill ProfileUser_TC004 into the username field
Verify the updated username ProfileUser_TC004 is displayed on the profile

title: User Profile: Open avatar selection and cancel without changing
description: Verifies the avatar selection can be opened and dismissed without applying changes.

steps.description: Verify the profile screen remains displayed

title: User Profile: Logout signs the user out
description: Verifies a user can log out from the profile screen and is returned to an unauthenticated entry screen.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the login screen

title: Learning Path Roadmap: Complete available node and see progress effects
description: Verifies selecting an available roadmap node lets the user start and complete a lesson, and the roadmap reflects completion with XP awarded/unlocks.

steps.description: Select an available node to view its lesson details
Progress through the lesson until completion using valid interactions
Verify an XP earned confirmation is visible at lesson completion
Verify the completed node is marked completed and at least one next node is unlocked

title: Learning Path Roadmap: Attempt to access locked node shows locked message and stays on roadmap
description: Verifies tapping a locked node shows a locked requirement message and does not navigate away from the roadmap flow.

steps.description: Scroll through the path progression to find a locked node
Verify a locked-node message with an unlocking requirement is visible
Verify the roadmap view remains displayed

title: Learning Path Roadmap: Roadmap loads and displays connected nodes
description: Verifies the main roadmap screen loads and shows the connected node progression for the current path.

steps.description: Verify the connected node roadmap for the current learning path is displayed

title: Learning Path Roadmap: Open node details from an available node
description: Verifies an available node can be selected and lesson details are shown.

steps.description: Select an available node to view its lesson details
Verify lesson details for the selected node are displayed

title: Learning Path Roadmap: Scroll through progression to later nodes
description: Verifies the roadmap supports scrolling to browse nodes across the path progression.

steps.description: Verify additional roadmap nodes are displayed after scrolling

title: Interactive Lesson Game: Complete lesson with correct answers and see XP + celebration
description: Verifies a user can complete a lesson by answering cards, receive correct feedback during play, and see XP plus celebration on completion.

steps.description: Progress through all lesson cards by selecting answer options until the lesson completes
Verify an XP earned confirmation is visible at lesson completion
Verify a completion celebration is displayed

title: Interactive Lesson Game: Incorrect answer triggers feedback and life loss indicator updates
description: Verifies selecting an incorrect answer produces incorrect feedback and a visible indication that a life was lost.

steps.description: Verify incorrect feedback is displayed for the selected answer
Verify the lives indicator shows a decrease in available lives

title: Interactive Lesson Game: Lesson card content renders for a started lesson
description: Verifies lesson content is displayed after opening a lesson card (e.g., prompt and answer options/media).

steps.description: Verify lesson card content is displayed with at least one actionable response option

title: Interactive Lesson Game: Correct answer triggers correct feedback
description: Verifies selecting a correct answer option produces correct visual feedback during the lesson.

steps.description: Verify correct feedback is displayed for the selected answer

title: Interactive Lesson Game: No-lives blocking state prevents lesson start when applicable
description: Verifies that if the user has no lives, attempting to start a lesson results in a blocking no-lives state preventing the lesson from starting.

steps.description: Attempt to open a lesson card
Verify either the lesson starts with lesson card content displayed or a blocking no-lives state is displayed preventing lesson start

title: Country exploration: browse countries, open a hub, then open recipes list
description: Verifies a user can browse countries, open a country hub, and navigate to the recipes list showing recipe items.

steps.description: Scroll through the list of countries/cuisines
Click a country to view its hub
Click the control to view the country’s recipes list
Verify a list of recipe items is displayed

title: Country selection page loads and shows browseable country list
description: Verifies the country selection screen loads and displays countries/cuisines that can be browsed.

steps.description: Verify a list of countries/cuisines is displayed

title: Open a country hub and see hub content sections
description: Verifies selecting a country opens a hub that surfaces recipes and cultural content areas.

steps.description: Click a country to view its hub
Verify country hub content is displayed including recipes and cultural content

title: Country hub shows user progress for the selected country
description: Verifies the country hub displays progress information for the selected country.

steps.description: Click a country to view its hub
Verify the user’s progress for this country is displayed

title: Navigate from a country hub to recipes list and verify recipes load
description: Verifies that from a country hub the user can open the recipes list and see recipe items rendered.

steps.description: Click a country to view its hub
Click the control to view the country’s recipes list
Verify recipe items for the selected country are displayed

title: Country selection supports switching between two different countries
description: Verifies the user can open one country hub, then switch to another country and see the hub update accordingly.

steps.description: Click a country to view its hub
Click the navigation control to return to the countries list
Click a different country to view its hub
Verify the hub content updates to the newly selected country

title: Country selection and hub handle empty content states gracefully
description: Verifies the UI shows an empty state when a country hub has no content available to display.

steps.description: Click a country to view its hub
Scroll through the hub content area
Verify an empty state message is visible if no hub content is available

title: Country recipes list supports scrolling through multiple items
description: Verifies the recipes list screen allows scrolling and continues to display recipe items.

steps.description: Click a country to view its hub
Click the control to view the country’s recipes list
Verify recipe items remain visible while scrolling

title: Pantry: view ingredients and add a new ingredient successfully
description: Verifies a user can view their pantry and add a new ingredient that appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the control to add a new ingredient
Fill Tomato Test Ingredient into the ingredient name field
Verify Tomato Test Ingredient is displayed in the pantry list

title: Pantry page loads and shows current pantry state
description: Verifies the pantry screen loads and displays either ingredients or an empty state.

steps.description: Verify pantry ingredients are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Pantry: validation prevents adding an ingredient with missing information
description: Verifies submitting the add-ingredient form with missing required data shows validation and does not add an item.

steps.description: Click the control to add a new ingredient
Verify a validation error is visible and the ingredient is not added

title: Pantry: add and then remove the same ingredient
description: Verifies a user can add a new ingredient and then remove it from the pantry list.

steps.description: Click the control to add a new ingredient
Fill Remove Me Ingredient into the ingredient name field
Remove Remove Me Ingredient from the pantry list
Verify Remove Me Ingredient is not displayed in the pantry list

title: Pantry: cancel out of add ingredient without creating an item
description: Verifies that exiting the add-ingredient flow without submitting does not add a new pantry item.

steps.description: Click the control to add a new ingredient
Fill Cancelled Ingredient into the ingredient name field
Click the control to cancel and return to the pantry list
Verify Cancelled Ingredient is not displayed in the pantry list

title: Pantry: prevent adding a clearly invalid ingredient name
description: Verifies the pantry add flow rejects an invalid ingredient name format and does not add it.

steps.description: Click the control to add a new ingredient
Fill a clearly invalid value into the ingredient name field
Verify a validation error is visible and the ingredient is not added

title: Leaderboard: view top users and see own position
description: Verifies the leaderboard shows ranked users and includes the current user’s position.

steps.description: Verify a ranked list of users is displayed with username, avatar, and XP, and the current user’s position is shown

title: Leaderboard page loads and displays rankings list
description: Verifies the leaderboard screen loads its primary content showing ranked users.

title: Leaderboard supports scrolling through the rankings
description: Verifies the user can scroll the leaderboard and continue to see ranked entries.

steps.description: Verify ranked user entries remain visible while scrolling

title: Leaderboard shows empty state when no rankings are available
description: Verifies the UI displays an empty state if the leaderboard has no entries to show.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible if no leaderboard entries are available

title: Leaderboard displays user profile details per entry
description: Verifies each leaderboard entry surfaces basic profile details needed for the rankings.

steps.description: Verify multiple leaderboard entries display username, avatar, and XP

title: Admin can access admin dashboard and see primary content
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can reach the admin area and see the dashboard content statistics.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed with content statistics

title: Admin can create a new learning node and see it in the library
description: Verifies creating a learning node from the admin interface results in the node appearing in the admin library list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the learning nodes library module
Start creating a new learning node
Fill "Test Node A" into the node title field
Fill valid content into the node body or description field
Verify the learning nodes library list includes "Test Node A"

title: Admin can edit an existing learning node and see updates reflected
description: Verifies an admin can edit a node created in-session and see the updated title in the library list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the learning nodes library module
Start creating a new learning node
Fill "Test Node Edit" into the node title field
Fill valid content into the node body or description field
Open the node details for "Test Node Edit"
Enter edit mode for the node
Fill "Test Node Edited" into the node title field
Verify the learning nodes library list includes "Test Node Edited"

title: Admin can delete a learning node and it is removed from the library
description: Verifies deleting a node created in-session removes it from the admin library list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the learning nodes library module
Start creating a new learning node
Fill "Test Node Delete" into the node title field
Fill valid content into the node body or description field
Open the node details for "Test Node Delete"
Confirm the deletion in the app confirmation UI
Verify the learning nodes library list does not include "Test Node Delete"

title: Non-admin or unauthenticated user cannot access admin route
description: Verifies attempting to access the admin route without authentication results in a redirect to login or an access denied view.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login screen or an access denied view is displayed

title: Create learning node requires mandatory fields
description: Verifies the node creation form blocks saving when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the learning nodes library module
Start creating a new learning node
Attempt to save the new learning node
Verify a form validation error is visible and the node is not saved

title: Admin can manage countries by creating a new country entry
description: Verifies creating a new country/cuisine entry from the admin countries module results in it appearing in the countries list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Start creating a new country or cuisine
Fill "Testland" into the country name field

title: Admin navigation between admin modules keeps admin shell accessible
description: Verifies the admin can move between modules and the admin shell remains usable for content management tasks.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the learning nodes library module
Verify the countries management view is displayed within the admin dashboard shell
